flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Mount St. Joseph University fell 18% between 2006 and 2009 (44.4% → 36.6%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Mount St. Joseph University rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($33.2k → $38.1k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Mount St. Joseph University rose 13% between 2006 and 2009 ($20.1k → $22.8k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Mount St. Joseph University fell 10% between 2006 and 2009 (61.2% → 55.0%).
